name: Custom Multispectral Survey Planning
description: You are a drone operator for a forestry research team planning a photogrammetry survey mission to map the field north of your home position for canopy NDVI calculation. Using the hardware specifications and flight profile found in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/camera_specs.txt, create a mission plan that includes a takeoff, a survey pattern covering the green field (at least 4 vertices), and a return-to-launch. Configure the custom camera sensor dimensions, lens physics, altitude, and overlaps exactly as specified in the document. Save the completed mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/multispectral_survey.plan.
